message:
✨ i18n: Complete localization infrastructure for all components (#1008)

* ✨ Phase 1: i18n CardWrapper.tsx - extract 380+ strings to translations

- Add useTranslation hook to CardWrapper and InfoTooltip components
- Replace all hardcoded UI strings with t() calls referencing cards/common namespaces
- Extract 158 card titles and 158 card descriptions to cards.json
- Extract cardWrapper UI strings: badges, tooltips, menu items, resize options
- Add card categories, addCard modal strings, and description fallback
- Fix duplicate 'dashboard' key in common.json (merge two instances)
- Keep CARD_TITLES/CARD_DESCRIPTIONS exports for non-React consumers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* i18n: Phase 2 — extract layout component strings

Wire useTranslation into all layout components:
- Navbar.tsx: aria-labels, theme toggle, mobile menu
- Sidebar.tsx: rename tooltip, remove button, cluster status labels
- SnoozedCards.tsx: section headers, empty states, action buttons
- UserProfileDropdown.tsx: profile labels, action buttons, language selector
- UpdateIndicator.tsx: update notifications, view details, skip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* i18n: Phase 3a — extract dashboard component strings

Wire useTranslation into dashboard components:
- ResetDialog.tsx: reset options, descriptions, cancel button
- CreateDashboardModal.tsx: form labels, template options, buttons
- TemplatesModal.tsx: headers, preview text, footer info
- CardRecommendations.tsx: AI label, action buttons, stats badges
- CustomDashboard.tsx: empty state, delete confirmation, error messages
- Expand common.json dashboard section with reset, create, templates, empty, delete keys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* i18n: Phase 3b — extract Dashboard, FloatingActions, Welcome, Missions strings

Wire useTranslation into Dashboard.tsx, FloatingDashboardActions.tsx,
WelcomeCard.tsx, and MissionSuggestions.tsx. Add dashboard.actions.*,
dashboard.welcome.*, and dashboard.missions.* keys to common.json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* i18n: Phase 3c — extract AddCardModal, DashboardCards, DropZone strings

Wire useTranslation into AddCardModal.tsx, DashboardCards.tsx, and
DashboardDropZone.tsx. Add dashboard.addCard.*, dashboard.dropZone.*
keys to common.json. CARD_CATALOG data strings left for later pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 i18n Phase 3d: Wire remaining dashboard modals

Extract hardcoded strings from ConfigureCardModal, ReplaceCardModal,
CardFactoryModal, StatBlockFactoryModal, InlineAIAssist, and
LivePreviewPanel into common.json translation keys.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* i18n: extract settings component strings to localization

Wire all 17 settings files with useTranslation hook and t() calls.
Covers: AISettings, APIKeys, Accessibility, Agent, GitHubToken,
LocalClusters, Notifications, Permissions, Persistence, Predictions,
Profile, SettingsBackup, Theme, TokenUsage, Widget, UpdateSettings,
and the main Settings page (nav labels, group headings, sync status).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* i18n: add useTranslation hooks to all card components

Wire useTranslation import and hook into all 152 card component files.
Files where t() is not yet used get { t: _t } to suppress TS6133.
Add 95+ common translation keys (search, filter, status, etc.) to
common.json for shared card UI patterns. Replace common search
placeholder patterns in 10 files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* i18n: batch extract common card strings to localization

Replace 117 hardcoded strings across 66 card files with t() calls:
- Search placeholders (searchClusters, searchEvents, etc.)
- Status labels (Healthy, Running, Failed, etc.)
- Column headers (Nodes, Pods, CPU, Memory, etc.)
- Action buttons (Save, Copy, etc.)
Fix scope issues in 9 files where t() calls landed in sub-components.
Add 22 search-specific keys to common.json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* i18n: add useTranslation hooks to all remaining components

Wire useTranslation into 101 remaining component files across
drilldown views, clusters, missions, marketplace, modals, shared,
deploy, feedback, alerts, history, and other directories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* i18n: batch extract strings from drilldown, cluster, and remaining components

Extract 253 hardcoded strings across 47 component files into i18n
translation keys. Adds drilldown-specific sections to common.json
(tabs, fields, status, actions, empty states, AI, tooltips, scale,
node). Fixes sub-component scope issues in 8 files where t() calls
landed in functions without their own useTranslation hook.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* i18n: second pass string extraction (tooltips, props, title attrs)

Extract 43 more strings across 22 files targeting title attributes,
aria-labels, string literal props, and additional status text.
Fix sub-component scope issues in RSSFeed, Clusters, ClusterGrid,
and Marketplace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
